title: Add second real school photo to gallery and update image assets

requirements.text: Add the newly uploaded school photo FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg as a second real campus image. Display it alongside FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg in the Gallery section so the gallery features at least two distinct real photographs of the school campus.

quotes: The user has uploaded 2 image(s): FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg, FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg

acceptanceCriteria: FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg is stored in frontend/public/assets/ and referenced correctly
The Gallery section displays both FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg and FB_IMG_1772019352532-1.jpg as real campus photos
Both images render without broken image errors
The gallery layout accommodates two or more real photos gracefully

constraints: Do not remove or replace FB_IMG_1772019352532.jpg which is already in use across Hero, About, Gallery, and Contact sections
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
